title: rhododendron subcrenulatum
intro: Rhododendron subcrenulatum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron subcrenulatum include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
